Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services to get the job done right.

“I had a power outage in the middle of the night during a blizzard. Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services responded quickly and had my power restored within a couple of hours. The electrician, Dave, was professional, courteous, and explained everything clearly. I highly recommend them!”

Sarah M. Emergency Electrical Repair
Mar 8, 2025

“My old electrical panel was outdated and couldn't handle the load of my new appliances. Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services upgraded my panel to a new, high-capacity model. The work was done efficiently and professionally. My only minor complaint was the communication leading up to the install could have been a bit better, but overall a great experience.”

John K. Electrical Panel Upgrade
Apr 15, 2025

“I hired Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services to install recessed lighting in my kitchen and pendant lights in my dining room. I am thrilled with the results! The lighting has completely transformed the look and feel of my home. The electrician, Mark, was meticulous and paid attention to every detail.”

Emily L. Lighting Installation
May 22, 2025

“I had some faulty wiring in my basement that was causing flickering lights and tripping breakers. Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services quickly identified the problem and repaired the wiring. I feel much safer knowing that my electrical system is in good condition.”

David P. Wiring Repair
Jun 1, 2025

“I had a couple of outlets that weren't working properly. Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services came out and quickly repaired them. The electrician was friendly and professional. I appreciated their prompt service.”

Karen S. Outlet and Switch Repair
Jul 10, 2025

“After losing power multiple times last winter, I decided to invest in a generator. Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services helped me choose the right generator for my needs and installed it quickly and efficiently. I now have peace of mind knowing that I'll have backup power during the next outage.”

Tom B. Generator Installation
Aug 18, 2025
Minneapolis Emergency Electrical Services

Trusted electrical contractor professionals serving Minneapolis, MN and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
